title: viola × magna
intro: Viola × magna, also known as the hybrid violet or common dog violet, is a plant species that combines characteristics of Viola sororia and Viola lanceolata. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Viola × magna include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Viola × magna can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, or used topically in the form of salves and ointments.
